title: Australian Shepherd's Pie
description: A classic comfort food dish from Australia, featuring ground meat and vegetables topped with a rich mashed potato crust.
instructions: Cook the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion and carrots to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the peas, flour, and beef broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Transfer the meat mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the meat mixture with the mashed potatoes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
